Photodynamic therapy with PHOTOFRIN® is indicated for:
- Palliation of patients with completely obstructing esophageal cancer, or of patients with partially obstructing
esophageal cancer who, in the opinion of their physician, cannot be satisfactorily treated with Nd:YAG laser
therapy.

1.1 Esophageal Cancer
PHOTOFRIN® is indicated for the palliation of patients with completely obstructing esophageal cancer, or of
patients with partially obstructing esophageal cancer who, in the opinion of their healthcare provider, cannot be
satisfactorily treated with Nd:YAG laser therapy.
